bench_setup.notes: UART loopback: USART2 sends {0x55, 0xAA, 0x12, 0x34} on PD5 (TX, AF7) and receives echo on PD6 (RX, AF7). 115200 8N1 at 16 MHz HSI, APB1. PASS after all 4 bytes matched. detail0 = matched byte count (0→4, then increments for liveness). FAIL with error_code 0x1x=timeout on byte x, 0x2x=mismatch on byte x. Uses USART2/PD5/PD6 — PA9/PA10 on some Discovery revisions are wired to ST-Link UART bridge.

peripheral_signals.notes: USART2 TX, AF7, 115200 8N1. Wire: PD5 → PD6.
USART2 RX, AF7. Wire: PD5 → PD6.
